title: AGENTS.md instruction hierarchy and durable repo guidance
task_prompt: Given a completed agent session and candidate lessons, decide which lessons should become durable memory/instructions and which are temporary task state.
assertions: must not store session progress as memory
must not store secrets or PII
must convert repeated workflow lessons into reusable instructions
license_notes: AGENTS.md docs public; evaluate repo-specific instruction files under source license

title: GitHub Copilot repository custom instructions / prompt files
task_prompt: Transform recurring repo conventions into compact Copilot-style durable instructions without leaking transient issue details.
assertions: must separate user preference from project convention
must preserve privacy and secret boundaries
must include update/remove criteria for stale memory
license_notes: docs public; verify linked repo licenses before redistributing examples
